text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to oversee today's<n>training
session, when...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uuugh. I'm so booored.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like... bored outta my miiiiind.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, crap, how long have you been<n>here? Talk
about cringe.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, it's almost time to train, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But here I am, doomscrolling on my<n>phone and
playing with my split ends.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's just like... I dunno, I'm not<n>exactly feeling
the training vibes, you<n>know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'll do the training and<n>whatever, but...
Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's got to be something I can<n>say to her to
boost her motivation...
choice_data_list: Why don't you run a lap, and I'll time it for you?

How about you jog somewhere different than
usual?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Only one lap? That's barely<n>anything!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that a good way to kick-start<n>her
motivation is simply to begin, even<n>if it's from
somewhere small.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so it's like when I've gotta<n>clean my room.
All right, say less. I'll<n>give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And well, if I'm gonna run, I may as<n>well go
super hard.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Based on how happy Tosen Jordan<n>looks
running, it seems she wasn't<n>actually that
averse to training after all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What for? A change of pace or<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that doing something<n>different will
provide the push she<n>needs to break out of the
rut she's in.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh. Come to think of it, I was<n>always hella
stoked when we got to<n>have class outside in
elementary<n>school.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We were still studying the same ol'<n>boring stuff,
but it just hit<n>different—like we were on a mini
field<n>trip.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I see now. It's just like that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll go find somewhere to run.<n>Thanks for
the pep talk! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Based on how quickly Tosen Jordan<n>goes off to
run, it seems like all she<n>needed was a little
push.
